title: RenHider
body:
This mod allows you to create special zones without client rendering and ticks when you are outside of them. 

Type ***/renhider help*** for instructions 

#### This mod requires [ASJCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/asjcore) to run.

Mod overview by [SuntannedDuck2](https://www.curseforge.com/members/suntannedduck2):

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/TdJCbHcaHho" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
